data.title: Volcon, Inc. holds 3,183.37 BTC worth $375 million, averaging $117,697 per BTC. They authorized $100 million for share repurchase.
data.description: Volcon, Inc. (NASDAQ: VLCN), based in Austin, Texas, revealed today that they currently hold 3,183.37 BTC as of July 25th at 8:00am ET. This acquisition was made at an overall purchase cost of approximately $375 million, with an average price of $117,697 per BTC. Additionally, the company has engaged in the sale of several short-term put contracts. These contracts provide Volcon with the chance to acquire more BTC at $115,000, $116,000, and $117,000, while also receiving option premium.

data.title: PTA Connected Initiative provides free tools to help families set healthy limits for children in digital age. #YouthDigitalHabits
data.description: A program called PTA Connected Initiative in Alexandria, Va., established on July 25, 2025, is aiding families with raising children in the digital era. This initiative offers free tools to assist in setting healthy boundaries and fostering positive digital experiences. Parenting in the digital age presents challenges, with families struggling to navigate the complexities. PTA Connected aims to address this by equipping families with resources to manage technology use effectively. By providing these tools, the program hopes to facilitate a healthier digital environment for children.

data.title: Arch Insurance introduces new Individual Supplemental Health product suite to help with out-of-pocket expenses, covering deductibles, co-insurance, and out-of-network charges.
data.description: Arch Insurance’s Accident & Health division based in Hunt Valley, Maryland has introduced a new suite of Individual Supplemental Health products. This offering is aimed at aiding individuals in handling out-of-pocket costs that are often not included in primary medical plans, like deductibles, co-insurance, and out-of-network fees. The suite includes various benefits such as Accident Medical Expenses. This initiative is in line with Arch Insurance’s commitment to providing comprehensive insurance solutions to both businesses and individuals.

data.title: Revival Healthcare Capital partners with Olympus for $458 million investment in co-founded company Swan EndoSurgical, boosting robotics innovation.
data.description: Revival Healthcare Capital, based in Austin, Texas, has revealed a new strategic alliance with Olympus. This partnership will involve a combined investment of up to $458 million into Swan EndoSurgical.
